task_completion.description: The agent opened the 'Investor Update Preparation' event in Odoo Calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar interface is visible with the 'Investor Update Preparation' event details open in a form or edit view.

task_completion.description: The agent added the Legal Counsel (Karen Lee) as an attendee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Karen Lee' is visible as a selected tag or entry in the 'Attendees' field of the event form.

task_completion.description: The agent set the meeting location to 'Board Room'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Location' field in the event form contains the text 'Board Room' (or at least 'board').

task_completion.description: The agent added a meeting agenda to the description covering financial performance, projections, and compliance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' text area contains an agenda mentioning financial performance, projections, and compliance items.

task_completion.description: The agent configured an advance email reminder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Reminders' field shows an 'Email' reminder configured (e.g., 'Email: 15 Minutes' or similar).

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo interface (http://localhost:8069), not a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the event form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active cursors in text fields, dropdown menus being opened, or the 'Save' button being clicked.

integrity.description: The agent did not use backend scripts or database commands to update the event.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl commands, python scripts, or database queries are used to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Event: 'Investor Update Preparation'. Attendee to add: 'Karen Lee' (she is the Legal Counsel for Northbridge). Required Location: 'Board Room' (must contain 'board'). The description must contain an agenda. The reminder must be an Email reminder.
